hero.subtitle: Experience world-class dental care in a serene, luxury environment. Your comfort and confidence are our only priorities.

about.label: About Lumina Dental
about.description: Founded by Dr. Sarah Mitchell, Lumina Dental has been redefining patient care for over 15 years. We combine cutting-edge technology with a warm, spa-like atmosphere.
about.feature_1_desc: 3D imaging, laser dentistry, and digital impressions for precise, pain-free treatments.
about.feature_2_desc: Aromatherapy, noise-canceling headphones, and heated blankets.
about.feature_3_desc: Every treatment plan is crafted uniquely for your smile goals.

services.label: Our Services
services.heading: Comprehensive Dental Care
services.subtitle: From routine checkups to complete smile makeovers — premium care tailored to you.
services.svc_2_desc: Ultra-thin shells that perfect shape and color.
services.svc_3_desc: Brighten up to 8 shades in a single session.
services.svc_4_desc: Painless modern therapy to save your tooth.
services.svc_5_desc: Invisible aligners for a perfectly aligned smile.
services.svc_7_desc: Gentle, fun care for comfortable visits.

process.label: How It Works
process.heading: Three Simple Steps
process.subtitle: Booking your dream smile has never been easier.
process.step_1_desc: Fill out our simple form — it takes less than 60 seconds.
process.step_2_desc: Our coordinator confirms your appointment within 30 minutes.
process.step_3_desc: Visit our clinic and leave with the smile you've always wanted.

gallery.label: Smile Gallery
gallery.heading: See the Transformation
gallery.subtitle: Drag the slider to compare before and after results.

testimonials.label: Patient Stories
testimonials.heading: Loved by Thousands
testimonials.t1_quote: I was terrified of dentists my whole life. Lumina changed everything. Dr. Mitchell is incredibly gentle and the spa environment made me forget I was at a clinic.
testimonials.t2_quote: The results exceeded every expectation. I went from hiding my smile in photos to being the one who initiates them. Life-changing.
testimonials.t3_quote: My kids actually look forward to their dental appointments now. The pediatric team is amazing — fun, patient, and skilled.

booking.label: Book Your Appointment
booking.subtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll confirm within 30 minutes.
booking.info_callout: Our coordinator will call within 30 minutes to confirm your appointment.
booking.success_message: We've received your request. Our coordinator will call you shortly.
booking.err_phone: Please enter a valid phone number
booking.err_required: Please fill in all required fields

footer.about: Redefining dental care with luxury, comfort, and cutting-edge technology since 2009.
